subcodes.title: Some Answered Questions #051 The Appearance of the Spirit and the Mind in Man
subcodes.first_line: The beginning of the formation of man on the terrestrial globe is like the formation of the human embryo
subcodes.first_line_orig: ابتدای تکون انسان در کرهء ارض مانند تکون انسان در رحم مادر است
subcodes.subjects: @evolution; human evolution, @progress only takes place within its own degree, @perfection; imperfection of nature, @mind as principle emanation; activity of the human spirit, @growth and progress is gradual and according to capacity
